headline: Explore the top gainers and losers within the S&P500 index in today's session.
summary: Curious about the top performers within the S&P500 index one hour before the close of the markets on Thursday? Dive into the list of today's session's top gainers and losers for a comprehensive overview.

headline: 3 Reasons CRL is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the past six months, Charles River Laboratories has been a great trade, beating the S&P 500 by 7.5%. Its stock price has climbed to $168.91, representing a healthy 10.5% increase. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.
